positive: A highly stylized, modern illustration of a majestic lunar forest at twilight. The scene features bioluminescent flora emitting soft teal and lavender glows, contrasting sharply with the deep indigo of the sky. In the center, a crystalline archway frames a crescent moon partially obscured by swirling nebulae. The composition must be highly symmetrical and clean, utilizing flat vector art principles with subtle gradient overlays for depth. Silhouettes are sharp and graphic, designed for direct print application on apparel. Minimalist aesthetic, vibrant yet controlled color palette. Style: Art Deco meets contemporary nature illustration.
